languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

languages.text: "Озвученный вами ассоциативный ряд отчего-то не кажется мне случайным, но разгадка ускользает от меня. Нунциус? Почему ты притих?"
"The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"
languages.original_text: "Озвученный вами ассоциативный ряд отчего-то не кажется мне случайным, но разгадка ускользает от меня. Нунциус? Почему ты притих?"

traits.locale_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"
"The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"
"The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

languages.text: «La serie de asociaciones que describes no me resulta aleatoria, pero no doy con la solución. ¿Nuncius? ¿Por qué te has quedado en silencio?».
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: «La serie de asociaciones que describes no me resulta aleatoria, pero no doy con la solución. ¿Nuncius? ¿Por qué te has quedado en silencio?».

languages.text: 「あなたが提示した連想の系列は、私にはどうも無作為なものには思えませんが、その解は私の手をすり抜けていきます。ヌンキウス？ なぜ黙り込んでいるのです？」
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが提示した連想の系列は、私にはどうも無作為なものには思えませんが、その解は私の手をすり抜けていきます。ヌンキウス？ なぜ黙り込んでいるのです？」

languages.text: “你提出的联想序列在我看来似乎并非随机，但我解不开其中的含义。努恩修斯？你怎么不说话了？”
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: “你提出的联想序列在我看来似乎并非随机，但我解不开其中的含义。努恩修斯？你怎么不说话了？”

languages.text: "Eure Assoziationskette scheint mir nicht zufällig zu sein, allein die Lösung entzieht sich mir. Nuncius? Warum sagt Ihr nichts mehr?"
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure Assoziationskette scheint mir nicht zufällig zu sein, allein die Lösung entzieht sich mir. Nuncius? Warum sagt Ihr nichts mehr?"

languages.text: « Vos associations ne me paraissent pas aléatoires, et pourtant, la solution m'échappe. Nuncius ? Pourquoi ce silence ? »
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: « Vos associations ne me paraissent pas aléatoires, et pourtant, la solution m'échappe. Nuncius ? Pourquoi ce silence ? »

languages.text: "Kurduğun çağrışımlar dizisi bana pek de rastgele gelmiyor. Yine de çözüm gözümden kaçıyor. Nuncius... Neden sustun?"
languages.original_text: "The associative series you set forth does not appear random to me somehow, but the solution eludes me. Nuncius? Why have you gone quiet?"

traits.locale_text: "Kurduğun çağrışımlar dizisi bana pek de rastgele gelmiyor. Yine de çözüm gözümden kaçıyor. Nuncius... Neden sustun?"
